授業目的: The purpose of this course is to improve students' ability to read, analyze, understand, discuss, and respond to authentic English articles on a variety of topics.
到達目標: Students will be able to: 1. Read authentic articles on topics related to language, culture, and society 2. Analyze written texts from a variety of genres and react to them critically 3. Write a 1000 word research article on a topic in introduced in class 4. Give an 8-minute multimedia presentation based on the content of your article 5. Lead small group discussions on research articles found outside of class
授業方法: Classes are conducted face-to-face in the classroom.

トピック.授業計画1:
Lessons held in the computer lab will be focused on research and writing for the final essay and presentation. Lessons held in normal classrooms will be for lectures, group discussions, and textbook activities.
Skills that will be highlighted in this course:
synthesizing information; quoting, paraphrasing, and summarizing, supporting opinions with facts and statistics, critical thinking, research skills, basic APA citation format, avoiding plagiarism, gathering data through field research
トピック.授業外学習2: Students must be highly motivated to succeed in this course. They will need to research, read, and prepare discussions for authentic English texts outside of class. Students must also work on their own research papers for homework.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
Each subject is placed on the curriculum based on the Diploma Policy (DP) and Curriculum Policy (CP) established by each faculty and graduate school. 
By studying these subjects with the DP and CP in mind, you will develop the following abilities expected by each faculty and graduate school. 
Language Education Subjects:1. Language communication skills: Ability to actively communicate using foreign language skills.2. Intercultural understanding and the ability to coexist with multiple cultures: To have sensitivity to different cultures and be able to coexist with diverse cultures.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Writing assignments (50%), Presentation (20%), Assignment (20%), Speaking Test (10%)
